requirements.full_sentence:
These Directions shall be termed as the Reserve Bank of India (Trade
Receivables Discounting System) Directions, 2026 and shall be effective
immediately.
requirements.object: Reserve Bank of India (Trade Receivables Discounting System) Directions, 2026 and shall be effective immediately

requirements.full_sentence:
(iii) Factoring Unit - refers to trade receivable in the form of invoice / bill uploaded
either by the seller (in the case of factoring) or by buyer (in case of reverse
factoring), as the case may be.

An entity shall seek authorisation for setting up and operating TReDS platform in
accordance with the RBI's Master Direction on 'Authorisation to operate a
Payment System.
requirements.object: up and operating TReDS platform in accordance with the RBI's Master Direction on 'Authorisation to operate a Payment Sy

requirements.full_sentence:
The entity must be a company incorporated in India and registered under the
Companies Act.
requirements.object: in India and registered under the Companies Act

requirements.full_sentence:
The Memorandum of Association of the entity must cover the
proposed activity of operating as a TReDS platform.
requirements.object: of operating as a TReDS platform

requirements.timeline:
within 45 days of
obtaining the no objection certificate
requirements.full_sentence:
An entity regulated by any of the financial sector regulator(s) shall apply along
with a 'No Objection Certificate' from such regulator(s), within 45 days of
obtaining the no objection certificate.
requirements.object: 'No Objection Certificate' from such regulator(s), within 45 days of obtaining the no objection certificate

requirements.full_sentence:
An entity having Foreign Direct Investment (FDI) shall be guided by the
Consolidated FDI policy of the Government of India and the relevant foreign
exchange management regulations on this subject.
requirements.object: Consolidated FDI policy of the Government of India and the relevant foreign exchange management regulations on this subject

requirements.full_sentence:
An applicant shall have a minimum net-worth of ₹25 crore and shall submit a
certificate in the format (as provided in Master Directions on Authorisation to
operate a Payment System dated June 15, 2026) from its statutory auditor.
requirements.object: of ₹25 crore and shall submit a certificate in the format (as provided in Master Directions on Authorisation to operate a Pay

requirements.full_sentence:
Existing entities authorised to operate TReDS platform shall ensure that net-
worth criterion is met latest by March 31, 2028.
requirements.object: criterion is met latest by March 31, 2028

requirements.full_sentence: The minimum net-worth shall be maintained on an ongoing basis.
requirements.object: ongoing basis

requirements.full_sentence:
The TReDS platform (hereinafter referred to as "platform") shall bring participants
together for facilitating uploading, accepting, bidding, discounting, and settlement
of the invoices / bills of sellers.
requirements.object: facilitating uploading, accepting, bidding, discounting, and settlement of the invoices / bills of sellers

requirements.full_sentence:
It shall put in place a suitable mechanism to
establish genuineness of the uploaded invoices / bills.
requirements.object: suitable mechanism to establish genuineness of the uploaded invoices / bills

requirements.full_sentence:
The platform shall ensure that participation related Master agreement includes
inter-alia the following stipulations:
requirements.object: Master agreement includes inter-alia the following stipulations:

requirements.full_sentence:
There shall be no option for the buyer for set-offs
with respect to quality of goods or otherwise.
requirements.object: the buyer for set-offs with respect to quality of goods or otherwise

requirements.full_sentence:
(iii) Since financing a transaction on TReDS will result in assignment of
receivables in favour of the financier, the platform shall file the said
assignment with the central registry (CERSAI), as provided under
Registration of Assignment of Receivables (Reserve Bank) Regulations,
2022 dated January 14, 2022 (as amended from time to time).
requirements.object: with the central registry (CERSAI), as provided under Registration of Assignment of Receivables (Reserve Bank) Regulations, 2

requirements.full_sentence:
It shall undertake customer due diligence (CDD) of buyers in accordance with
Reserve Bank of India (Commercial Banks - Know Your Customer) Directions,
2025, as amended from time to time.
requirements.object: (CDD) of buyers in accordance with Reserve Bank of India (Commercial Banks - Know Your Customer) Directions, 2025, as

requirements.full_sentence:
The platform shall put in place necessary validation mechanisms to ensure that
seller is an MSME, and funds due to seller are credited in the seller's bank
account only.
requirements.object: validation mechanisms to ensure that seller is an MSME, and funds due to seller are credited in the seller's bank account only

requirements.full_sentence:
It shall facilitate the discounting of factoring units by way of receiving bids from
multiple financiers in a transparent manner, resulting in flow of funds to the
sellers, providing intimation to banks holding working capital / cash credit
accounts of buyer and seller, serving of notice of assignment to buyer in favour
of financier, with final payment being made by the buyer to the financier on due
date.
requirements.object: factoring units by way of receiving bids from multiple financiers in a transparent manner, resulting in flow of funds to

requirements.full_sentence:
It may also enable further discounting / re-discounting of the discounted factoring
units by the financiers, resulting in its assignment in favour of other financiers.
requirements.object: / re-discounting of the discounted factoring units by the financiers, resulting in its assignment in favour of other f

requirements.full_sentence:
Such transfers shall be subject to relevant1 instructions issued by RBI, as
applicable.
requirements.object: instructions issued by RBI, as applicable

requirements.full_sentence:
Factoring units discounted under TReDS shall be "without recourse" to the
sellers.
requirements.object: the sellers

requirements.full_sentence: Default, if any, by the buyer shall not be responsibility of TReDS.

Financiers may avail insurance facility for TReDS transactions, subject to the
following:
requirements.object: TReDS transactions

requirements.full_sentence: (i) Premium for insurance shall not be levied on the seller.
requirements.object: seller

requirements.full_sentence:
(ii) Credit insurance shall not be treated as a Credit Risk Mitigant (CRM) to avail
any prudential benefits.
requirements.object: Credit Risk Mitigant (CRM) to avail any prudential benefits

requirements.full_sentence:
Financiers may avail guarantee in respect of factoring units from any credit
guarantee fund trust setup by Government of India.
requirements.object: of factoring units from any credit guarantee fund trust setup by Government of India

requirements.full_sentence: The platform shall be in custody of all the Master agreements.
requirements.object: all the Master agreements

requirements.full_sentence:
The platform shall facilitate efficient and seamless settlement of transactions
between financier and seller for financing of trade receivables and between buyer
and financier on the due date, using any authorised payment system.
requirements.object: settlement of transactions between financier and seller for financing of trade receivables and between buyer and fin

requirements.full_sentence: TReDS entity shall submit returns to RBI as listed in Annexure to this MD.
requirements.object: as listed in Annexure to this MD

requirements.full_sentence:
(i) Notwithstanding such repeal, all authorisation / approvals granted, actions
taken, and acknowledgements issued under the aforesaid circulars /
guidelines shall continue to be valid and shall be deemed to have been
granted under this Master Direction.
requirements.object: and shall be deemed to have been granted under this Master Direction

requirements.full_sentence:
(ii) The circulars and guidelines so repealed shall be deemed to have been in
force until the date of coming into effect of this Master Direction.
requirements.object: been in force until the date of coming into effect of this Master Direction
